auth.welcome_tagline: Find your path. Leave a light.
auth.login_welcome_hint: Sign in to continue your path with Postervia.
auth.set_password_hint: Choose a new password for your account. Make it at least 8 characters.
auth.biometric_unavailable: Biometric is not available on this device
auth.forgot_password_hint: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.check_email_hint: If an account exists for this email, we've sent a reset link.
auth.reset_password_hint: Create a new password for your account.
auth.birth_year_hint: Used only to verify your age. Never shown publicly.
auth.consent_tos_label: I have read and agree to the {tos}.
auth.consent_privacy_label: I have read and agree to the {privacy}.
auth.consent_marketing_label: Send me product updates by email (optional, unsubscribe anytime).
auth.consent_required_hint: Please accept the required consents to continue.
auth.underage_body: Postervia requires you to be at least 13 years old.
auth.minor_notice: You are under 16 — stricter privacy defaults will be applied.

errors.email_taken: This email is already registered. Try logging in instead.
errors.invalid_credentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.reset_email_unavailable: Password reset email is not available right now.
errors.reset_token_invalid: This reset link is invalid. Request a new one.
errors.reset_token_expired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.consent_required: Please accept the required terms and privacy policy first.

tasks.title: Odyssey
tasks.discard_confirm_body: It moves to your History. You can restore it any time.
tasks.history_empty_discarded: Tasks you discard will appear here.
tasks.empty_no_template: No tasks for this profile yet
tasks.empty_no_template_hint: Try switching your profile in the Profile tab.
tasks.side_progress_hint: Counted by number of side quests
tasks.side_empty_hint: See what's happening in your city — tap Add to Odyssey on any post to bring it here.
tasks.explore_plaza_body: See what's happening in your city — places, events and tips from locals.
tasks.settled_banner_title: Welcome — you're a local in {city} now.
tasks.settled_banner_body: You've finished every essential task. From here on, keep adding personal goals or help newcomers as a Buddy.
tasks.detail_notes_placeholder: Write down your own progress, deadlines, contacts…
tasks.detail_risk_generic: Always check the latest official source before acting — rules and prices change.
tasks.detail_risk_high: This task involves visa, residency, tax or insurance. Always confirm with the relevant office or a qualified advisor — content here is preparation only.
tasks.detail_no_description: No description for this task yet.
tasks.detail_no_sources: No official source has been linked for this task yet.

plaza.title: Plaza
plaza.composer_hint: Post practical tips, questions, recommendations, and warnings for people navigating a new city.
plaza.composer_hint_local: Share local discoveries, event plans, and rediscovery routes that help people experience Berlin beyond their usual routine.
plaza.publish_success: Your post is live in Plaza.
plaza.review_notice: Your post is saved and waiting for moderation review.
plaza.comments_empty: No comments yet. Add the first helpful reply.
plaza.empty: No posts yet. Share the first practical tip for this community.
plaza.place_helper_hint: Type `/place spot name` in the post box or tap the shortcut below. We'll search matching places and fill the source link for you.
plaza.place_helper_empty: No matching places yet. Try a more specific name.
plaza.location_picker_hint: Search a shop, cafe, venue, or landmark and attach one or more real locations to this post.
plaza.location_picker_empty: No matching places yet. Try a more specific name.
plaza.composer_content_statement: Share practical, local, and trustworthy information. Posts may be reviewed before wider distribution.
plaza.photo_empty: You can add up to four images.
plaza.photo_limit: You can add up to four images to one post.
plaza.photo_permission_denied: Photo library access is required to attach images.
plaza.report_confirm_body: Report this post as misleading, spammy, or unsafe?
plaza.delete_failed: Could not delete this post. Please try again.
plaza.add_to_tasks_failed: Could not add this to your Odyssey. Please try again.
plaza.hide_post_confirm_body: Hide this post from your feed? You won't see it again on this device.
plaza.post_reported_toast: Reported. Thanks for helping keep Plaza safe.
plaza.hide_comment_confirm_body: Hide this comment from your view? You won't see it again on this device.
plaza.report_comment_confirm_body: Report this comment as misleading, spammy, or unsafe?
plaza.comment_reported_toast: Reported. Thanks for helping keep Plaza safe.
plaza.privacy_public_hint: Anyone in Plaza can see this post.
plaza.privacy_update_failed: Could not update privacy. Please try again.

documents.title: Scribe
documents.scan_permission_denied: Camera permission is required to scan documents.
documents.empty: Upload a German government document - AI will explain it
documents.ask_ai_hint: Ask follow-up questions in plain language. AI will use the document first and search for up-to-date information when needed.
documents.chat_empty: No questions yet. Ask what this document means, what deadline matters, or what you should do next.
documents.question_placeholder: Ask a follow-up question about this document...
documents.search_hint: For official or time-sensitive questions, AI may check the web before answering.

buddy.title: Buddy
buddy.marketplace_coming_soon_body: Browse local buddies and bring-back orders right here. Apply now to be among the first when we open.
buddy.intro_headline: Find a local who's been there.
buddy.intro_body: Buddy connects newcomers in Berlin with locals who can accompany you to errands, doctor visits, shopping, or just a meal. We're in private beta — apply to become a Buddy.
buddy.pending_status_body: We'll email you with the result within 24 hours.
buddy.approved_status_body: Welcome aboard. Watch WhatsApp — onboarding details are on the way.
buddy.rejected_status_body: Thanks for applying. You can reapply in 30 days.
buddy.invited_status_body: Check your WhatsApp for next steps.

apply.title: Become a Buddy
apply.submitted_toast: You're signed up as a Buddy. Check your inbox for the welcome email.
apply.already_active_error: You're already registered as a Buddy.
apply.generic_error: Could not submit. Please try again.
apply.bio_label: Tell newcomers what you can offer
apply.bio_placeholder: e.g. I can accompany you to doctor visits, help with Anmeldung at the Bürgeramt, show you around supermarkets, or just grab a coffee and chat in German/English. Write as much as you like — newcomers will read this when picking a Buddy.
apply.bio_hint: Describe in your own words. No length limit. Examples above are just starting points.
apply.submit_consent_inline: By signing up, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
apply.validation_required: Please fill in name, age, and gender.

buddy.compose_title_placeholder: One line about what you need or offer
buddy.compose_body_placeholder: Describe your need or offer in detail
buddy.compose_price_free_hint: No payment needed. The amount field will be locked.
buddy.compose_price_negotiable_hint: Open to negotiation in chat. You can still suggest a starting amount.
buddy.feed_empty_hint: Posts will appear here when people need help or offer it.

errors.duplicate_post: Too many similar posts recently — try a different wording.
errors.publish_banned: Your publishing access has been suspended.
errors.gender_required: Please set gender in your profile before posting
errors.post_not_found: This post no longer exists or has expired

labs.title: Labs
labs.scribe_hint: AI document explainer. Being phased out — your existing documents are still here.

billing.title: Postervia+
billing.hero_headline: Get the full path, not just the first 5 steps.
billing.hero_body: Postervia+ unlocks the complete task DAG, the verified guide library, unlimited AI Copilot, unlimited document parsing, and half-rate Buddy fees. 7-day free trial.
billing.feature_full_dag: Complete task DAG — main + side + alternatives, deadlines, source verification.
billing.feature_verified_guides: Verified guide library, kept current with last_verified_at dates.
billing.feature_unlimited_ai: Unlimited AI Copilot — ask follow-ups on any document or task.
billing.trial_disclaimer: Card required to start the trial. Cancel any time during the 7 days and you won't be charged. After that, your card is charged automatically.
billing.trial_ends_on: Trial ends {date}. Your card will be charged after that.
billing.cancels_on: Cancels on {date}. You keep access until then.
billing.already_subscribed: You already have an active subscription.
billing.checkout_error: Could not open Stripe Checkout. Please try again.
billing.paywall_tasks_headline: You've reached the free task limit.
billing.paywall_tasks_body: Free accounts see the first 5 tasks. Postervia+ unlocks the entire DAG — including side tasks, alternative paths, and deadline tracking.
billing.paywall_ai_chat_headline: You've used your 5 free AI questions this month.
billing.paywall_ai_chat_body: Postervia+ unlocks unlimited AI Copilot questions across all your documents and tasks.
billing.paywall_doc_ocr_headline: You've used your 1 free document this month.
billing.paywall_doc_ocr_body: Postervia+ unlocks unlimited document parsing — bills, contracts, and any German government letter.
billing.paywall_generic_body: Postervia+ removes free-tier limits across the app. Try 7 days free.

profile.title: Profile
profile.user_not_found_hint: This user may have left or their profile is unavailable.
profile.edit_bio_discard_body: Your edits to bio will be lost.
profile.qr_scan_hint: Open Postervia and scan this QR code to view this profile.
profile.scan_qr_aim_hint: Aim at a Postervia profile QR code.
profile.scan_qr_permission_body: Allow Postervia to use your camera to scan profile QR codes.
profile.scan_qr_permission_denied: Camera access is blocked. Enable it in Settings to scan codes.
profile.scan_qr_invalid_body: This QR code doesn't link to a Postervia profile.
profile.privacy_subtitle: Choose which sections other users can see when they visit your profile.
profile.privacy_self_always_visible_hint: You can always see all of your own tabs.
profile.privacy_tab_hidden_for_viewer: This user keeps this tab private.
profile.bio_placeholder: Tap here to add a bio...
profile.posts_archive_hint: Your past Plaza posts live here.
profile.posts_empty_hint: Share a useful note in Plaza and your archive will start growing here.
profile.empty_comments_hint: Your replies on Plaza posts will show up here.
profile.empty_saves_hint: Save useful posts and find them here later.
profile.empty_likes_hint: Posts you like will appear here.

social.title: Social
social.search_hint: Search by nickname, city, or email, then send a friend request in one tap.
social.search_empty: No matching people yet. Try a different keyword.
social.no_requests: No pending friend requests right now.
social.no_friends: No friends yet. Start by searching for people.
social.group_name_required: Give your group a name first.
social.group_description: What kind of plan or vibe does this group share?
social.group_members_required: Pick at least one friend for this group.
social.no_groups: No groups yet. Create the first one from your friend list.
social.no_group_events: No meetup yet. Add the first shared plan.
social.event_description: What is the plan and why are you meeting?
social.event_time_hint: Use 24-hour time like 19:30. End time is optional.
social.event_required_fields: Add a title, place, start date, and start time.
social.no_other_chats_hint: Add friends or join a group to start chatting
social.conversation_empty_group: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
social.conversation_empty_direct: Say hi to get the conversation going.
social.messages_search_hint: Search contacts, group chats, and chat history.
social.messages_search_no_results_description: Try searching contacts, groups, or messages.
social.search_id_hint: Enter a full 10-digit ID for an exact match
social.send_friend_request_default: Hi, I'd like to connect on Postervia.
social.buddy_no_conversations_hint: Browse Buddy posts and tap Contact on one to start chatting — no friending required.

places.tap_map_hint: Tap on the map to drop a pin, or search above

onboarding.title: Set up your city flow
onboarding.location_step_title: Choose how we should find your city
onboarding.city_step_title: Pick the city you are in
onboarding.persona_step_title: Tell us why you are here
onboarding.location_prompt: Want to use your location for the best first experience?
onboarding.location_hint: If you allow location, Postervia can detect your city and tailor tasks and Plaza recommendations right away. If not, you can search and choose your city manually.
onboarding.location_denied: Location permission was denied, so please choose your city manually.
onboarding.location_failed: We could not detect your city just now. Choose it manually instead.
onboarding.city_hint: Start typing the city name, then tap the best match.
onboarding.city_empty: No matching city yet. Try a more specific name.
onboarding.intent_prompt: What are you doing in this city?
onboarding.intent_hint: Choose one or more goals so we can shape tasks and Plaza content around your real life here.
onboarding.stage_prompt: Which stage fits you best right now?
onboarding.stage_hint: This stage controls your main taskline. You can change it later from Profile.

comments.comment_published: Comment published. View it under My Profile - Comments.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_hint: When someone follows you or replies to your comments, you'll see it here.

chat.stt_unsupported: Voice input not supported for this language

map.upload_photos_prompt: Upload photos to the group map?

settings.title: Settings
settings.privacy_visibility_hint: Choose which tabs others see on your profile
settings.search_visibility_hint: Control whether others can find you by name or ID
settings.search_visibility_explainer: Decides whether other users can find you in search. When hidden, your account never appears in results — outsiders cannot tell whether the account exists.
settings.search_visibility_open_hint: Searchable by display name or 10-digit ID. Best if you want strangers to find you.
settings.search_visibility_limited_hint: Only people who already know your full 10-digit ID can find you. Default and recommended.
settings.search_visibility_hidden_hint: Cannot be found by name or ID.
settings.privacy_consents_hint: Review and withdraw any consent you have given
settings.privacy_data_hint: Export, delete or restrict processing of your data
settings.privacy_recommendations_hint: Switch personalized feed and learn how it works
settings.consents_pending_body: This screen will list every consent you have given (privacy policy, terms, marketing email, ML training, etc.) and let you withdraw any of them at any time. The screen is being built.
settings.data_export_hint: Download all data we hold about you (GDPR Art. 15/20)
settings.data_delete_hint: Submit a deletion request — 30-day grace period before permanent (GDPR Art. 17)
settings.data_restrict_hint: Pause all processing of your data (GDPR Art. 18)
settings.data_pending_body: Data subject request endpoints are being built. We answer every request within 30 days.
settings.recommendations_pending_body: Here you will be able to switch between Personalized / Chronological / Following-only feeds and read a plain-language summary of the algorithm. The screen is being built.
settings.data_export_confirm_body: We will package your account, content and interaction history into a ZIP. We will email you a 7-day download link when it's ready.
settings.data_export_in_progress: Export in progress — we'll email you when ready.
settings.data_export_expired: Download link has expired. Please request again.
settings.data_delete_confirm_body: Your account is taken offline immediately and permanently deleted after 30 days. You can cancel any time during the grace period.
settings.data_delete_pending_body: Your account will be permanently deleted in {days} days. You can cancel until then.
settings.data_restrict_confirm_body: Once restricted, we stop using your data for recommendations, analytics, etc. You can lift it any time.
settings.data_restrict_active_body: We are not processing your data right now. Tap below to lift the restriction.
settings.pending_deletion_banner_title: Your account is scheduled for deletion
settings.pending_deletion_banner_body: We will delete it permanently in {days} days. Tap to cancel.

report.description_placeholder: Tell us why this content violates the rules. Specifics help us act faster.
report.good_faith_label: I confirm this report is made in good faith and is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
report.submitted_toast: We received your report. You will hear back within 7 days.

legal.pending_review_body: This document is being reviewed by a German lawyer. Do not publish until the final version ships. For compliance questions, email dpo@novaku.app.
